title: Dell Technologies (DELL) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Dell Technologies (DELL) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended July 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Dell Technologies Inc. (DELL) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL ) Q2 2024 Earnings Conference Call August 31, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Robert Williams - Head of Investor Relations Jeff Clarke - Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer Yvonne McGill - Chief Financial Officer Tyler Johnson - Senior Vice President & Treasurer Conference Call Participants Shannon Cross - Credit Suisse David Vogt - UBS Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Toni Sacconaghi - Bernstein Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Erik Woodring - Morgan Stanley Amit Daryanani - Evercore ISI Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Asiya Merchant - Citigroup Inc. Michael Ng - Goldman Sachs Simon Leopold - Raymond James Steven Fox - Fox Advisors LLC Krish Sankar - TD Cowen Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Fiscal Year 2024 Second Quarter Financial Results Conference Call for Dell Technologies Inc. I'd like to inform all participants this call is being recorded at the request of Dell Technologies. This broadcast is a copyrighted property of Dell Technologies Inc. Any rebroadcast of this information in whole or part without the prior written permission of Dell Technologies is prohibited.

title: Dell Technologies (DELL) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Dell Technologies (DELL) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.74 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.13 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.68 per share a year ago.

title: Dell rides the AI boom to impressive 2Q earnings results
text: Dell Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:DELL)shares surged in extended trading after the company's second-quarter revenue and earnings easily exceeded expectations.  For the quarter ended August 4, Dell posted revenue of $22.9 billion, down 13% year-over-year but well above the Street expectations of $20.9 billion.

title: Dell Technologies Trounces Second-Quarter Goals; Stock Jumps
text: Computer hardware giant Dell Technologies crushed Wall Street's estimates for its fiscal second quarter, sending its shares higher.

title: Dell Technologies Delivers Second Quarter Fiscal 2024 Financial Results
text: News summary Second quarter revenue of $22.9 billion Operating income of $1.2 billion and non-GAAP operating income of $2 billion Diluted earnings per share of $0.63, and non-GAAP diluted earnings per share of $1.74 Second quarter cash flow from operations of $3.2 billion ROUND ROCK, Texas , Aug. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Full story Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) announces financial results for its fiscal 2024 second quarter. Revenue was $22.9 billion, down 13% year-over-year and up 10% sequentially.

title: The Top 5 High Yield Blue Chip Dividend-Paying Tech Stocks
text: After a careful search, the top five high-yield blue-chip dividend-paying tech stocks have been rooted out. These companies are all leaders in their field, supported by secular trends, producing solid results in 2023, expected to grow in 2024 and have exposure to AI.

title: Dell looks for Nvidia bump, Lululemon and others to report: Day ahead
text: Investors and analysts alike will be watching Thursday for whether Dell Inc. (NASDAQ:DELL) can ride the coattails of its surging artificial intelligence (AI) partner NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) when the company reports second-quarter earnings after the bell. Dell offers some exposure to Nvidia's success through Project Helix, an effort to help businesses use breakthrough generative AI that the two companies launched in May.

title: Dell hopes for 2Q Nvidia bounce thanks to Project Helix partnership
text: Dell Inc. (NASDAQ:DELL) is scheduled to report earnings after the market closes on Thursday, and investors are hoping the recent surge from the company's artificial intelligence partner NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is a positive indicator.  Nvidia shares hit a record high Wednesday on the heels of the company's own results, driven by soaring demand for its AI chips.

title: Earnings Previews: Broadcom, Dell, Lululemon
text: After U.S. markets closed on Tuesday, HP met analysts' consensus estimate for earnings per share (EPS) and missed the revenue consensus by about 1.4%.

title: Dell Technologies and Denvr Dataworks to Unleash Generative AI Innovation
text: ROUND ROCK, Texas , Aug. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- News Summary Dell Technologies and Denvr Dataworks offer cloud solutions for LLM training and inference for organizations using generative AI Organizations can manage datasets containing hundreds of billions of parameters with Denvr Dataworks' solution on Dell PowerEdge XE9680 servers Full story Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) and Denvr Dataworks, an emerging provider of high-performance cloud infrastructure, are working together to help organizations tap the capabilities of generative AI (GenAI). By combining the security and reliability of the Dell PowerEdge XE9680 server with Denvr Dataworks' delivery of high performance cloud computing optimized for AI, organizations can spend less time on configuring their environments and start producing groundbreaking AI results faster.

title: Top-Rated Tech Stocks to Consider as Earnings Approach
text: Broadcom (AVGO) and Momo (MOMO) are two top-rated tech stocks set to report their quarterly results on Thursday, August 31.

title: Will Nvidia Partnership Give Dell Technologies Q2 Earnings a Boost?
text: Many eyes are on Dell Technologies (DELL) stock this week with the technology solutions provider set to report its Q2 results on Thursday, August 31.

title: Dell NativeEdge Software Empowers Innovation at the Edge
text: Ecosystem partners help customers more simply deploy and manage solutions for smarter edge environments ROUND ROCK, Texas , Aug. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- News summary  Dell NativeEdge software platform, now globally available, simplifies application orchestration and infrastructure management across thousands of edge devices and locations Dell collaborates with ISVs, system integrators, resellers and OEM customers to expand availability of new edge solutions with Dell NativeEdge Full story  Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) announces the global availability of Dell NativeEdge, the edge operations software platform that simplifies how customers deploy, manage and secure their edge infrastructure and applications. Dell is also growing its partner and OEM customer ecosystem to help organizations use Dell NativeEdge to simplify the orchestration and expansion of their edge environments.

title: Are Wall Street's earnings estimates too optimistic? ‘There is no more fear, only complacency,' JPMorgan strategist says
text: The Wall Street analysts who follow companies in the S&P 500 index SPX tend to be an upbeat bunch, but as second-quarter earnings reporting season winds down, are they too upbeat on the months ahead? A JPMorgan strategist last week said yes.

title: Holding On To Dell Technologies: A Dividend Pick Among Tech Stocks
text: Dell Technologies is downgraded to Hold, from my prior May rating of Buy. The hold rating is in line with the SA quant system rating. Positives: dividend yield vs sector, P/E ratio vs sector, capital strength. Headwinds: poor YoY earnings growth, share price vs 200-day SMA is overpriced.

title: Dell Technologies to Hold Conference Call Aug. 31 to Discuss Second Quarter Fiscal 2024 Financial Results
text: ROUND ROCK, Texas , Aug. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) will conduct a conference call Thursday, Aug. 31, 2023, at 3:30 p.m. CDT to discuss its fiscal 2024 second quarter financial results.

title: DELL Australia Faces $6.5M Fine for False Monitor Pricing
text: DELL announces that its Australian unit has been fined A$10 million by the Federal Court over false monitor discount information.

title: Computer Server Demand Is Fading. AI May Be Why.
text: Dell Technologies and Hewlett Packard Enterprise are two of the largest sellers of servers worldwide.

title: Is the AI Party Over? 5 Drivers for the Next Surge
text: AI is the game-changing innovation of the current bull market cycle. However, short-term price action often forms false opinions for investors.

title: With HP and Dell Earnings Coming Soon, PC Demand Is Showing Signs Of Life
text: Taiwan's Acer and Asus both showed year-over-year growth in July PC sales.

title: Dell Stock Spikes on High Hopes for AI-Related Servers
text: Morgan Stanley says the company could be a play on servers used for generative artificial intelligence applications.

title: Investors Are Overlooking The AI Opportunity At Dell
text: The wider PC market has faced challenges in the post-COVID world, with longer IT refresh cycles and reduced budgets. Dell computer has been affected by these industry-wide trends. However, we think investors have largely overlooked the coming AI opportunity set for IT hardware.
